problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation — specifically Aerogel porosity for — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
